## Summary

Describe the feature or capability.

## Problem

What limitation or pain point does this solve?

## Proposal

Describe the proposed behavior, API, or workflow.

## Related module

Reference the relevant section in `PLAN.md` or `ROADMAP.md` if applicable.

## Additional context

Benchmarks, prior art, or compatibility requirements are welcome.
